name: Radial — One Health Research Framework (8 spokes)
input: Create a radial diagram for the One Health research framework. Central hub: One Health. Spokes: Human Health (infectious disease surveillance), Animal Health (veterinary epidemiology), Environmental Health (water quality monitoring), Food Safety (farm-to-fork tracking), Antimicrobial Resistance (susceptibility testing), Climate Change (vector ecology), Zoonotic Disease (spillover events), Policy Integration (multi-sector governance).
qualityCriteria: Items present (Human Health, Animal Health, Environmental, Food Safety, Antimicrobial, Climate, Zoonotic, Policy)
Description for each item is present
No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
Central node with spokes radiating outward
napkinBenchmark: Central 'One Health' hub with 8 labeled spokes radiating outward, each with an icon and description.

data.title: One Health Research Framework

items.label: Human Health
items.description: Infectious disease surveillance and clinical epidemiology

items.label: Animal Health
items.description: Veterinary epidemiology and livestock disease monitoring

items.label: Environmental Health
items.description: Water quality monitoring and pollution assessment

items.label: Food Safety
items.description: Farm-to-fork pathogen tracking and supply chain analysis

items.label: Climate Change
items.description: Vector ecology shifts and disease range expansion

items.label: Zoonotic Disease
items.description: Cross-species spillover events and emergence risk

items.label: Policy Integration
items.description: Multi-sector governance frameworks and interagency coordination

data.caption: Interconnected research domains within the One Health paradigm
